name: Robotics
subtitle: Designing, Building, and Programming Robots!
description: Learn how to build and program robots that move, sense, and interact with their environment using mechanical systems and coding.

name: Coding
subtitle: From Visual Blocks to Advanced Programming!
description: Start coding with block-based tools and progress to advanced text-based programming, algorithms, and real-world problem solving.

name: ML/AI
subtitle: Teaching Machines to Think!
description: Explore the basics of Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence, including logical thinking, automation, and smart systems.

name: Electronics
subtitle: From Circuits to Smart Devices!
description: Understand electronic components, circuits, control systems, and microcontrollers used in gadgets and robots.

name: 3D Modelling
subtitle: Designing in Three Dimensions!
description: Learn to design 3D models and objects used in engineering, robotics, and product design using modern tools.

name: Physics
subtitle: Understanding How the World Works!
description: Study physics from basic to advanced levels, covering motion, energy, electricity, waves, and modern physics concepts.

name: Chemistry
subtitle: Exploring Matter and Reactions!
description: Learn the fundamentals of chemistry, including elements, compounds, reactions, and real-world chemical applications.

name: Biology
subtitle: Discovering Life and Living Systems!
description: Explore the science of life, from cells and organisms to ecosystems and human biology.

name: Mathematics
subtitle: From Basics to Advanced Problem Solving!
description: Build strong mathematical foundations and advance through algebra, geometry, and higher-level problem solving.

name: Computer Science
subtitle: Understanding Computers Inside and Out!
description: Learn computer fundamentals including hardware, operating systems, software, and core computing concepts.
